name: @moulibheemaneti/commitguard
description: A CLI tool to manage Git hooks (pre-commit, commit-msg, pre-push) in any Node.js / JS / TS project. Similar to husky and lefthook.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/cli.js && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/index.js
